formation.form_name: Form 205 - Certificate of Formation, Limited Liability Company

processing_fee.label: Texas credit card convenience fee
processing_fee.source_note: Texas SOS states credit card fees are subject to a statutorily authorized convenience fee of 2.7 percent of total fees.

formation.expected_processing_time: Real-time to several business days depending on SOSDirect/SOSUpload path and state review.
required_consents: Customer authorization for SOSFiler to prepare and submit formation documents
Registered agent consent in written or electronic form
required_evidence_for_submitted: Submitted Form 205 copy or filing image
